\begin{table}[t]
\centering
\caption{\textbf{Main result.} Best-in-budget distance to majority-class chance (signed $S - S_{\text{floor}}$ at the trajectory step closest to floor in pp; $0$ = at chance, lower in absolute value is better) and panels at floor ($|S{-}S_{\text{floor}}| \le 0.5$pp) over reachable panels, on all 39 NLP panels (13 model families $\times$ 3 concepts) at 50\%-depth using a fresh nonlinear probe ($h{=}128$, 200 SGD, patience 3). $\lambda$-based methods use $\lambda \approx 29.31$, the mean per-row $\lambda_i$ produced by the proposed pipeline (App.~Tab.~\ref{tab:lambda_stats}); LEACE-only and LEACE$+$CovMatch $K{=}2$ are one-shot closed-form. Obliviator uses paper-HP. \TanGCE{} is the proposed pipeline at fixed $\varepsilon{=}0.1$, $h{=}512$. Bold = column-best; multiple methods within 0.05pp of the best are all bolded. Per-panel detail across all 39 panels is in App.~Tab.~\ref{tab:per_panel_breakdown}.}
\label{tab:main_results_unified}
